title: Homelife for easy living Surf 1800w Steam Iron/Non-stick Soleplate/Steam, Shot of Steam or Dry Iron/Adjustable Temperature and Steam Control / 1.9m long cord / E7503 / Blue
features: STEAM AND DRY IRON: With steam, shot of steam and dry iron functions, this 1800w iron is designed to help remove even the most stubborn creases. With a 220ml water tank, steam rate of 25g per minute and shot of steam rate of 50g/min creases don't stand a chance!

ADJUSTABLE STEAM RATE CONTROL: Tailor to the needs of your garment by adjusting the amount of steam released when the steam button is pressed. A higher setting will cause a large amount of steam to release from the iron whereas lower settings will cause a small, more concentrated release of steam

VARIABLE THERMOSTAT CONTROL DIAL: Adjusting the dial allows you to set the ideal temperature setting depending on the types of fabrics being ironed. Using the dial, choose from the cotton, linen silk and wool settings or set your own temperature. The red pilot lamp will turn off to indicate the correct temperature has been reached. Get the perfect finish every time.
NON-STICK SOLEPLATE: The non-stick soleplate glides easily over fabrics and doesn't stick, so there's no worry about damaging garments.

ERGONOMIC DESIGN: The comfortable ergonomic handle allows for greater stability and control over the iron during use and the 1.9m cord is ideal for easy manoeuvring. The heel rest allows you to stand the iron vertically to set aside safely.
description: Remove even the most stubborn creases with the homelife for easy living Surf Steam Iron. With continuous steam, shot of steam and dry iron settings creases don't stand a chance! The Surf easily adapts to the needs of your garment with adjustable steam rate control and variable thermostat control to adjust both how much steam is realised and the temperate of the soleplate. The non-stick soleplate glides easily over garments so there's no worry about sticking. The stylish design and comfortable ergonomic handle allows for greater stability and control over the iron during use and the 1.9m cord is ideal for easy manoeuvring. The heel rest allows you to stand the iron vertically to set aside safely. Box Includes: 1x Homelife Surf Steam Iron in blue 1 x Instruction Manual 1x Water Jug
